title: Thai-Style Stir-Fried Noodles
description: A quick and delicious Thai-inspired stir-fry made with thin noodles, vegetables, and your choice of protein.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the curry paste and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles, fish sauce, and soy sauce to the wok or skillet.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped glassy noodles if desired.
Note: You can customize this recipe by adding your favorite protein or vegetables.
